mapper.sql: rdp_user_kv_base_config.id id, rdp_user_kv_base_config.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_user_kv_base_config.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_user_kv_base_config.uid uid, rdp_user_kv_base_config.config_name config_name, rdp_user_kv_base_config.config_value config_value, rdp_user_kv_base_config.default_value default_value, rdp_user_kv_base_config.value_range value_range, rdp_user_kv_base_config.read_only read_only, rdp_user_kv_base_config.user_config_tag_type user_config_tag_type, rdp_user_kv_base_config.conf_val_type conf_val_type, rdp_user_kv_base_config.conf_belong conf_belong, rdp_user_kv_base_config.is_secret is_secret, rdp_user_kv_base_config.desc_key desc_key
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_user_kv_base_config WHERE rdp_user_kv_base_config.uid = #{uid} AND rdp_user_kv_base_config.config_name = #{configName}

SELECT
FROM rdp_user_kv_base_config WHERE rdp_user_kv_base_config.uid = #{uid} and rdp_user_kv_base_config.user_config_tag_type = #{type}
